ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For An Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec. 12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Gary Lieberman, for Rickey Tassano, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel provides the court with an update regarding the Estate and requests a continuance to file a Petition for Termination. The matter is continued to Jun-15-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
